subject: Re: 1.07w crashes when switching to side-by-side view
body:
Same issue came up at me as well.
Some additional info: before crashing and giving the above error message, 
the parameter sidebar is actually shown minimized. The highlighted file 
does not exist at D:\ partition.
I hope this information helps!

5/25/2020 5:02:53 PM:
System.InvalidOperationException: Specified element is already the logical 
child of another element. Disconnect it first.
   at System.Windows.FrameworkElement.ChangeLogicalParent(DependencyObject 
newParent)

Imre
